summary: V54.8 Avatar Presence System Testing Complete. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: ProximityItem elements were hidden due to overly broad CSS selector in index.css. Fixed by making the selector more specific. All 17 backend API tests pass. All 8 migrated spatial pages verified working (Games, Dreams, Soundscapes, Affirmations, Academy, Breathing, Meditation, Sacred Texts). Avatar3D, AvatarBadge, SpatialRoom, ProximityItem, and SpatialRecorderUI all functioning correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Items were hidden (display:none, opacity:0) due to CSS selector [style*='bottom'][style*='left'] matching padding-bottom/padding-left inline styles
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Changed CSS selector from [style*='bottom'][style*='left'] to [style*='bottom:'][style*='left:'] and added :not([data-testid^='proximity-item-']) exclusion in /app/frontend/src/index.css line 5014

critical_code_review_comments: CSS selector at line 5014 in index.css was too broad - [style*='bottom'][style*='left'] matched any element with 'bottom' or 'left' anywhere in style attribute, including padding-bottom and padding-left
context_for_next_testing_agent: V54.8 Avatar Presence System fully verified. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: ProximityItem CSS collision issue resolved. All 8 migrated pages working: Games, Dreams, Soundscapes, Affirmations, Academy, Breathing, Meditation, Sacred Texts. Avatar3D diamond crystal visible. AvatarBadge shows [x,y] coordinates. ProximityItem collision-based opacity working (1.0 for collision, 0.95 for active, 0.75 for near, 0.5/0.25 for far). World progress tracking via localStorage emcafe_world_progress working.

tests_executed.details: Health, Crystals, Dream Symbols, Moon Phase, Games Scores (auth), Dreams (auth), Soundscapes My-Mixes (auth), Affirmations My-Sets (auth), Breathing My-Custom (auth), Meditation My-Custom (auth), Academy Programs (auth), Academy Accreditation (auth), Dreams Patterns (auth), Affirmations Daily, Unauthorized access tests
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-default), Avatar3D container, AvatarBadge [4,0], 5 ProximityItem elements, 5 game cards, Record Journey + Cinematic Mode buttons
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-oracle), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge, Journal/Patterns/Symbols tabs, Moon phase display, Dream form, SpatialRecorderUI
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-frequencies), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge, 9 soundscape elements, 9 ProximityItem elements, SpatialRecorderUI
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-default), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge, Mode toggle (Daily/Build Your Own), 8 theme buttons, Affirmation text, SpatialRecorderUI
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-teachings), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge. Shows 'Sign in to access' for unauthenticated users (expected behavior)
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-breathing, AIR realm), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge, 5 breathing patterns, Mode toggle, Breathing toggle button, SpatialRecorderUI
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-meditation), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge, Guided/Cosmic/Build Your Own/Timer modes, 6 meditation presets visible, SpatialRecorderUI
SpatialRoom (spatial-room-sacred_texts), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge, World progress tracking in localStorage

SpatialRoom (spatial-room-crystals, HOLLOW_EARTH realm), Avatar3D, AvatarBadge [4,0], 12 ProximityItem elements, Chakra filters, Search bar, Record Journey + Cinematic Mode. BUG FIXED: Items now visible with proper proximity-based opacity
After CSS fix: Item 0 (collision) opacity=1, Item 1 (active) opacity=0.95, Item 2 (near) opacity=0.75, Items 3-4 (far) opacity=0.5
localStorage emcafe_world_progress updated when visiting rooms

spatial_features_verified.Avatar3D: Diamond crystal shape visible as fixed element on all spatial pages
spatial_features_verified.SpatialRoom: Room atmosphere (particles, walls, realm styling) working for all room types
spatial_features_verified.SpatialRecorderUI: Record Journey + Cinematic Mode buttons visible on migrated pages

bug_fixed.issue: ProximityItem elements hidden (display:none, opacity:0, height:0, width:0)
bug_fixed.root_cause: CSS selector [style*='bottom'][style*='left'] in index.css line 5014 was matching elements with padding-bottom and padding-left inline styles, not just position:bottom/left
bug_fixed.fix: Changed selector to [style*='bottom:'][style*='left:'] and added :not([data-testid^='proximity-item-']) exclusion
bug_fixed.verification: All 12 crystal items now visible with proper proximity-based opacity
